programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom; she creates a home theater and an immense deck and patio to turn the home into an entertaining showpiece.

programme.desc: Tamara Day tackles a large 1905 Colonial with seven sun porches; she overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet; unsupported floors and a strange noise during demolition slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.desc: Chip and Joanna take on a historical project for Courtney and Joey Scrivano, who are ready to upgrade from their modest loft to a house where they can raise their new baby; the 1927 Tudor home is outdated and lacks a true master suite.

programme.desc: A Dallas couple hunts for a beach retreat that's large enough to share with their family and friends in Cape San Blas, Fla.; they find a bargain bungalow close to the water; but it comes with the price of needing a lot of work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple from Long Beach dreams of a retreat on Washington state's Puget Sound, where rocky shores, pine trees and hiking replace California beaches. With young kids growing up fast, they hope to reconnect with family and nature by restoring a hidden gem.
